plain_english_summary: Expands access to community health resources and creates reporting requirements for coordination between public agencies.
Modernizes small-business permitting by simplifying application processes and requiring digital submission options.

clean_title: Public Transit Safety and Access Act
plain_english_summary: Focuses on transit safety, access improvements, and reporting on transportation infrastructure needs.
Encourages redevelopment of underused properties for housing and mixed-use community development.
